name: ts-type-extractor
description: Extract TypeScript type annotations from React codebases for ML training data

scripts.pipeline: tsx src/extract.ts data/repos/radix-primitives data/repos/tanstack-query data/repos/react-hook-form data/repos/react-aria data/repos/react-router data/repos/zustand --context 7 --output data/extracted_types.jsonl && tsx src/degrade.ts data/extracted_types.jsonl --output data/training_pairs.jsonl
